basic_details.job_title: PNGRB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Individual Consultant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB)
basic_details.short_information: Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) has published the Consultant (Engineering) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment is being conducted for the post of Consultant (Engineering) on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 62 years of age and holding a B.Tech. in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Petroleum, or Civil Engineering are eligible to submit their offline applications on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Petroleum or Civil Engineering
qualification.details: B. Tech in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Petroleum or Civil Engineering

salary_details.details: Consultant (Engineering) Level II: Rs. 90,000/- Per Month Consultant (Engineering) Level III: Rs. 1,20,000/- Per Month Consultant (Engineering) Level IV: Rs. 1,40,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PNGRB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.petroleum_and_natural_gas_regulatory_boa: B. Tech in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Petroleum or Civil Engineering

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PNGRB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PNGRB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B. Tech in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Petroleum or Civil Engineering

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Consultant (Engineering) Level II: Rs. 90,000/- Per Month Consultant (Engineering) Level III: Rs. 1,20,000/- Per Month Consultant (Engineering) Level IV: Rs. 1,40,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PNGRB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Consultant (Engineering) positions, candidates must possess a B. Tech degree in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Petroleum, or Civil Engineering from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant (Engineering) posts is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) positions?
faq.answer: The salary for Consultant (Engineering) positions ranges from Rs. 90,000/- to Rs. 1,40,000/- per month, depending on the specific level of the consultant role.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this PNGRB recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Consultant (Engineering) posts is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the PNGRB located?
faq.answer: The Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) is located in New Delhi, with a pincode of 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific vacancies announced for different categories?
faq.answer: The provided data indicates that the total number of vacancies for all Consultant (Engineering) posts is 0. Specific vacancy distribution for UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories is not available.
